news_items.headline: Aroldis Chapman wants an apology from Yankees GM Brian Cashman before entertaining potential reunion
news_items.summary: Boston Red Sox closer Aroldis Chapman told ESPN Deportes that he would need Yankees GM Brian Cashman to "apologize first" before accepting a potential trade back to the Bronx, but didn't rule out the possibility of a reunion.
